title: Too many Physics
description: This is the minecraft modpack, which adds realistic physics into the game
body:
### **AD: Best Minecraft hosting in the world, Octant. You can buy server on octant.fun**

Too Many Physics is a unique Minecraft build that adds realistic physics and many new features to the game. It includes improved physics for blocks, objects and fluids, making the game more fun and challenging.
One of the main features of Too Many Physical is the realistic destruction of blocks. Now, when the player breaks the blocks, they break into many small pieces, each with its own physics of falling. In addition, the destruction of one block can affect neighbouring blocks, creating a chain reaction effect and making the destruction even more spectacular and epic.
Another interesting feature of Too Many Physical is the realistic physics of mobs. Upon death, mobs turn into rag dolls that fall to the ground and disappear. However, players can enable a mode in which mobs disintegrate into fragments, including blood.
In addition, Too Many Physical adds realistic ocean physics, allowing you to customise waves and storms. Also, dynamic blocks such as vines, doors and ropes are given their own physics, making their interaction with the outside world more realistic.
All in all, Too Many Physical is a great choice for those who want to improve the gameplay and enjoy a more realistic and exciting Minecraft world.
